chunks.text: Technical Reports - Nir Yosef. Directed Shortest Walk on Temporal Graphs (EECS-2022-195) Alex Khodaverdian and Nir Yosef. Meta-analysis of massive parallel reporter assay enables functional regulatory elements prediction (EECS-2018-79) Zhongxia Yan.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the technical reports by Nir Yosef?
chunks.answer: Directed Shortest Walk and Meta-analysis reports.

chunks.text: A deep generative model for gene expression profiles from single-cell RNA sequencing (EECS-2018-21) Nir Yosef, Michael Jordan and Romain Lopez. Distributed Visualization for Genomic Analysis (EECS-2017-82) Alyssa Morrow.
chunks.question: Which technical reports involve gene expression and genomic analysis?
chunks.answer: Deep generative model and Distributed Visualization.
